title: Froot Trees
description: Grow colorful Froot Trees that produce nine varieties of brand new fruit! A whole new wood set, plus crates and bags from Farmer's Delight, tons of new food, and more!
body:
![Froot Trees header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6505f32c37b8e44fa157266f8a139216f2bed3c8.png)

# Trees!
Froot Trees come in nine varieties, each growing a different colorful Froot. You can tell them apart by their vibrant flowers, but they all have the same vividly rainbow interior. Froot wood can be stripped, made into planks, and used to build stairs, doors, trapdoors, fences, signs, and boats!

![Frootwood set](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73f9bd5beac352c7693c9b452c8261717473829c.png)

# Froots
![Froots list header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6dd168929e553abd30603ef191386c127cbc36e6.png)

There are nine different colorful Froots for you to grow! Blood Oranges, Damson Plums, Coffee Cherries (which can be processed into Raw Coffee and then Roasted Coffee), Lisbon Lemon, Key Lime, Coral Star Peach, Almonds, Purple Heart Pomegranate, and Kwai Mai Lychee. The seven standard Froots can be put into Crates with Farmer's Delight, and the Almonds and Coffees can be put into Bags.

![Froot crates and bags](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f77c21640c6fd3bb23ecc3e166d60a13347a8b8.png)

# Foods
Once you've grown your Froots, you can use them to make a wide variety of new foods! There are tarts and pies, chocolate bars, sorbets, and many more! If you have [Cocktails Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/cocktails-delight), Froot Trees covers most of your fruit needs for creating ingredients to craft your drinks with!

![Froots foods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c50d023acdc71a950f562242df3af90bb3ae8686.png)

# Status Effects
Froot Trees adds six new status effects you can get from eating/drinking all the craftable foods and beverages.

Steady Stance: Knockback Resistance
Swift Strike: medium Attack Speed boost
Combat Ready: small Attack and Armor boost
Pushback: Knockback boost
Bean Buzz: small Speed and Attack Speed boost
Sweet Aroma: 10% bonus to Max Health

![Froots status effects](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32c668621750830cef9fd04bb52e94ba6decc075.png)

Join [my Discord!](https://discord.gg/kpN4eRbVsS)
